hero.title: System Analyst from Argentina to the World
hero.subtitle: Technical Architect crafting high-performance digital products.
hero.codeComment: Excellence is not an act, it is a habit

about.profile_html: I am a dedicated Frontend Specialist with over 6 years of experience building high-performance web and mobile applications. My expertise lies in the React JS & React Native ecosystem, where I leverage TypeScript to build robust, type-safe architectures that stand the test of time.
about.qa_html: What sets my approach apart is a quality-first mindset shaped by my background in Quality Assurance (QA). Having spent time in a QA role, I view code through a highly critical lens, anticipating edge cases and potential failures long before they reach production. I am a firm advocate for:
qa_points: Test-Driven Reliability: Implementing comprehensive Unit Testing with high coverage to ensure code is not just functional, but maintainable and resilient.
Scalable Architecture: Writing clean, modular code that simplifies the debugging process and facilitates long-term growth.
User-Centric Design: Bridging the gap between technical excellence and seamless user experiences, ensuring every interface is as intuitive as it is performant.
about.soft_skills_html: I consider myself a proactive professional with excellent soft skills, always eager to learn and ready to take on new challenges. I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute to the full development lifecycle—from initial UI/UX concepts to final deployment and quality validation.
about.journey_p1_html: My story in technology began in 2005 as a state employee, where I developed administrative systems using Visual FoxPro. This early experience gave me a solid foundation in logic and database management.
about.ent_html: In 2008, I channeled my technical knowledge into my own business. For over a decade, I managed a computer services and hardware retail store. This period was crucial for developing my proactive mindset and soft skills, as I was directly responsible for technical problem-solving and customer success.
about.dt_p1_html: In 2019, I was invited back to my original public sector workplace to lead a critical transition. With a more mature perspective, I proposed and executed the migration of legacy desktop systems to modern web architectures.
about.dt_p2_html: Using React, Firebase, and Bootstrap, I successfully migrated key administrative modules, including:
about.dt_p3_html: This experience was a turning point, allowing me to master modern frontend workflows before transitioning fully into the private sector at Temperies.
about.drives_me_intro: When I’m not at my desk, I’m usually focusing on the things that keep me grounded and inspired:
about.family_desc: I have been happily married for 14 years, and I am a proud father of two—a 13-year-old daughter and a 10-year-old son. They are my greatest motivation.
about.cars_desc: There is something incredibly rewarding about bringing an old vehicle back to life. It’s the same 'problem-solving' itch I get from coding, but with a lot more grease!
about.music_desc: I love playing the piano and guitar. It’s my favorite way to switch off the logical brain and tap into something more creative.
about.travel_desc: Exploring new places with my family is our favorite way to create lasting memories together.

projects.description: Transforming industries through code. From the automotive, real estate, and e-commerce sectors, I develop robust interface architectures that drive urban and digital growth. I am guided by precision, scalability, and logic.

saas.title: STOCKAUTOS
saas.content: Sistema de gestión automotriz con automatización mediante n8n. Permite la publicación masiva o individual de vehículos de forma automática en múltiples plataformas, optimizando el alcance de concesionarias. Backend robusto sobre Supabase.

alkila.title: Alkila
alkila.content: Plataforma inmobiliaria enfocada en el mercado de Santa Rosa. Desarrollada con React, Tailwind y Supabase, ofrece un sistema avanzado de filtros y búsqueda para conectar inquilinos con propiedades locales de forma eficiente.

RAM Informática.title: RAM Informática
RAM Informática.content: E-commerce y dashboard administrativo integrado. Utiliza React y Python para automatizar la actualización de precios: un script procesa mensajes de WhatsApp Business de proveedores y recalcula márgenes de ganancia en tiempo real sobre Supabase.

detakito.title: deTaquito
detakito.content: Showcase de rendimiento extremo en React Native utilizando Fabric Architecture para una experiencia de usuario fluida y nativa.

controlgastos.title: ControlGastos
controlgastos.content: Web App 100% responsiva (React + Tailwind) para gestión financiera personal. Incluye control de gastos fijos, variables, tarjetas de crédito y préstamos, con reportes gráficos detallados sobre el flujo de caja. Backend en Supabase.

mission.humor_desc: Software development doesn't have to be rigid. Maintaining a positive and collaborative environment accelerates problem-solving and fosters creativity in code.
mission.proactivity_desc: I don't just write code; I anticipate needs, propose real architectural improvements, and act before bottlenecks impact the product.
mission.responsibility_desc: Total ownership of the metrics. From the first commit to production deployment, the success of the project is my absolute priority.
